inclusion_criteria: Randomized controlled trials comparing an Internet- or mobile-based intervention (IMI) to standard care, treatment as usual, waitlist, or no-intervention control
Adults (≥18 years) with overweight (BMI ≥25) or obesity (BMI ≥30) who have comorbid depressive symptoms at baseline
IMI delivered via web browser or smartphone app with a primary aim to improve mental health (e.g., depressive symptoms), self-guided or digitally guided
Reports quantitative outcomes for depressive symptom severity and for weight-related outcomes (e.g., weight, BMI) at post-intervention or follow-up
exclusion_criteria: Non-randomized designs (e.g., observational, quasi-experimental, single-arm) or RCTs without a standard care/no-intervention control
Populations not limited to adults with overweight/obesity and comorbid depressive symptoms, or mixed samples without extractable subgroup data
Interventions not delivered via web/app (e.g., SMS-only, telephone/video psychotherapy, wearables-only) or primarily weight-focused without a mental health aim
Studies that do not report depressive symptom severity or do not report weight-related outcomes
screening_criteria.description: Screen studies for adult participants with overweight/obesity and comorbid depressive symptoms in RCTs evaluating web- or app-based mental health IMIs versus standard care/no intervention, with both depressive symptoms and weight outcomes reported.
